settings.heading: CAQA Compliance Team is here to help!
settings.description:
Facing a regulatory audit can be challenging, and the aftermath of non-compliance findings even more so. At CAQA Compliance, we're committed to turning these challenges into opportunities for your RTO.
Rectifying non-compliance isn't just about fixing an compliance issue. It's a chance to demonstrate your Registered Training Organisation's (RTO) commitment to quality, continuous improvement, and student welfare. However, navigating the rectification process can be complex.
settings.right_description:
Here's how CAQA's Rectification Support Service can help!

  • Understand the Non-Compliance: Gain a clear understanding of the identified issue and its potential impact.
  • Develop a Comprehensive Response: We will work with you to craft a well-defined rectification plan that addresses the non-compliance effectively.

• Gather Evidence and Documentation: We will guide you through the process of compiling the necessary evidence to demonstrate your corrective actions.
  • Communicate Effectively: We will assist you in setting up effective communication channels with regulatory bodies like the Australian Skills Quality Authority (ASQA), guiding you through the interpretation of regulatory and legislative requirements.
  • Minimise Risk and Impact: Our support minimises the potential disruption and reputational risk associated with non-compliance.

settings.heading: Why Choose CAQA Compliance for Rectification Support?

settings.text:
✓ Proven Track Record of Success:  Our team boasts a successful history of guiding RTOs through rectification

✓ Expert Consultants at Your Side: Every CAQA Compliance consultant is a seasoned professional with a deep understanding of RTO regulations and the rectification process.

✓ Trusted by RTOs Nationwide: Numerous RTOs across Australia have placed their trust in CAQA Compliance.

✓ Time-Tested Tools and Strategies: We leverage a suite of validated resources and strategies that have been refined through experience. This ensures a streamlined and efficient rectification process.

✓ Benefit from Industry Expertise: Our team includes specialised training experts who bring a wealth of knowledge to the table.

✓ Customised Solutions for Every RTO: We recognise that every RTO operates differently. We'll work closely with you to develop a personalised rectification plan that addresses your specific needs.

✓ Unwavering Commitment to Your Success: Your success is our top priority. We'll go the extra mile to ensure a smooth and successful rectification process for your RTO.

✓ Transparent Pricing with No Hidden Costs: We value clear communication. Upfront pricing means you'll know exactly what to expect without any surprise fees.

 

Let's Address Non-Compliance Together!

Reach out to us at info@caqa.com.au or call 1800 266 160 for a discussion tailored to your needs.

Looking forward to supporting you on this journey.

settings.head: Need more information? Contact CAQA Compliance Team!
